decision_commentary: Excellent proposal. Both language versions complete with no placeholders. Scope exactly reflects Tomás's approved public_civic SOW. Budget exactly matches Bruno's figures ($180,000 USD, 20/15/20/25/20). Process narrative appropriately references obra pública procurement framework and government approval cycles — correct institutional positioning. Only deduction is simulated Asana state sync.
